PlotMetadataForm.dolilAreaHint: Area written in the deed document.
PlotMetadataForm.actualAreaHint: Real/verified area — may differ from dolil or GPS.

PlotMetadataForm.sensitiveLockedNotice: Village, mutation number, prices, and notes are encrypted. Unlock encryption in Profile to view or edit them.
PlotMetadataForm.decryptError: Couldn't decrypt with the current session key.
PlotMetadataForm.willEncryptNotice: Village, mutation number, prices, dates, and notes will be saved encrypted.

PlotDetailPage.loadError: Couldn't load this plot — {message}. Try refreshing the page.
PlotDetailPage.gpsDerivedNotice: GPS-derived — walking/manual boundary drawing can introduce error. See dolil and actual measurements below for cross-check.

PlotActions.trialEnded: Your trial has ended — please upgrade to continue.
PlotActions.needThreePoints: Need at least 3 points to form a boundary

BoundaryWalker.webglError: Map couldn't load — this browser/device doesn't support WebGL, which the map needs.
BoundaryWalker.imageryUnavailable: Imagery not available at this zoom level here — zoom out a bit.
BoundaryWalker.removePointConfirm: Remove this point from the boundary?
BoundaryWalker.geolocationUnavailable: Geolocation is not available on this device/browser.
BoundaryWalker.queuedOfflineMessage: Saved on this device — will finish syncing once you're back online.
BoundaryWalker.mapErrorWithFallback: {mapError} You can still mark points below — they'll save without a map preview.
BoundaryWalker.gpsDotHelp: The blue dot is your current GPS position — that's the exact point "Mark point" will record. Tap a marked point on the map to remove just that one.
BoundaryWalker.offlineBanner: Offline — points are saved on this device and will sync automatically.
BoundaryWalker.walkInstructions: Walk the boundary of the plot. Tap "Mark point" at each corner as you go.

ManualBoundaryDrawer.webglError: Map couldn't load — this browser/device doesn't support WebGL, which the map needs.
ManualBoundaryDrawer.locationError: Couldn't get your location — check location permission.
ManualBoundaryDrawer.clearAllConfirm: Clear all points and start over?
ManualBoundaryDrawer.searchPlaceholder: Search a place to navigate there...
ManualBoundaryDrawer.tapInstructions: Tap the map to drop a corner (4–6 for most plots). Drag a point to reposition it, double-tap a point to remove it.

PlotMap.webglError: Map couldn't load — this browser/device doesn't support WebGL, which the map needs.
PlotMap.imageryUnavailable: Imagery not available at this zoom level here — zoom out a bit.
PlotMap.downloadFailed: Download failed — check your connection and try again.
PlotMap.offlineDownloadHint: Offline download only works on the satellite view for now — switch to Satellite to download this area.

DocumentRow.deleteFailed: Couldn't delete this document. Try again.

PdfPreviewModal.unlockEncryption: Unlock encryption in Profile to preview this document.
PdfPreviewModal.decryptError: Couldn't decrypt with the current session key.

DocumentActions.trialEnded: Your trial has ended — please upgrade to continue.
DocumentActions.fileTooLarge: File is too large — max 20 MB.

EncryptionSettings.passphraseTooShort: Passphrase must be at least 8 characters.
EncryptionSettings.recoveryCodeHint: If you forget your passphrase, this is the only other way to recover encrypted plot data. Landly cannot reset it for you.
EncryptionSettings.unlockedForSession: Unlocked for this session. Sensitive plot fields (mutation number, prices, dates, notes, village) are encrypted before leaving your device.
EncryptionSettings.lockedForSession: Encryption is enabled but locked for this session. Enter your passphrase to view or edit sensitive plot fields.
EncryptionSettings.setupExplanation: Encrypt sensitive plot fields (mutation number, purchase price, dates, notes, village) client-side, so only you can read them — not even Landly. Boundary/map data stays unencrypted (needed for area calculation and map rendering). This passphrase is separate from your login password, and lost passphrase + lost recovery code means that data is gone for good.

MigratePlotsToEncrypted.confirmMigrate: Encrypt all existing plots now? This clears the plaintext copy of each field — only recoverable by unlocking with your passphrase or recovery code.
MigratePlotsToEncrypted.encryptedCount: Encrypted {count, plural, =1 {# existing plot} other {# existing plots}}. New plots encrypt automatically while unlocked.
MigratePlotsToEncrypted.migrationExplanation: Plots created before you enabled encryption still have plaintext sensitive fields. This re-saves each one encrypted and clears the plaintext copy — reversible only by unlocking with your passphrase or recovery code.

SyncManager.syncFailed: Some changes couldn't sync — will retry automatically.
